rulings.Case Title: ANDRIY KRAVCHUK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, OMAR MASRY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer to the first cause of action for defamation is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts addressing the changed allegations in the first amended complaint. Compare Complaint paragraph 21 and First Amended Complaint paragraph 11. The Court reserves the ruling on the issue of immunity and privilege until such time when the "sham pleading" issue is resolved. The demurrer regarding the sufficiency of allegations regarding defamation is overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAISY DUARATE VS. BELKY AZUCENA SAGASTUME ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discover, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2018 line 7. PLAINTIFF DAISY DUARATE's Motion To Compel Responses To Discover, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide verified complete responses to Request for Production, Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $560. = (501/REQ)
